blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
